description: Microsoft Outlook elevation of privilege vulnerability. Specially crafted email triggers NTLM hash leak against an attacker-controlled SMB endpoint, enabling pass-the-hash attacks.
Microsoft Outlook remote code execution via Moniker Link bypass of Protected View. Allows RCE when the user previews a crafted email.
Windows Server 2019 Hyper-V remote code execution via crafted VHD image ingestion.
Veeam Backup & Replication authenticated RCE via deserialization in the configuration database endpoint.
